title: rubus × nudatus
intro: Rubus × nudatus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or thimble raspberry, is a cross between the Rubus idaeus and the Rubus fruticosus species of plants. This plant is rich in antioxidants and has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × nudatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
